title: Bargaining 讨价还价
scene: 在夜市上，顾客和摊主讨价还价。

lines.en: Excuse me, how much is this hat?
lines.zh: 打扰一下，这顶帽子多少钱？

lines.en: It's forty yuan. Very good quality!
That's a bit expensive. Can you make it cheaper?
How about thirty-five yuan? That's my best price.
lines.zh: 三十五元怎么样？这是最低价了。

lines.en: Hmm, how about twenty-five yuan? I'll buy it right now.
lines.zh: 嗯，二十五元行吗？我现在就买。

lines.en: Twenty-five is too low. I can do thirty.
lines.zh: 二十五太低了。三十元可以。

lines.en: What if I buy two hats? Can you give me a better deal?
lines.zh: 如果我买两顶呢？能再优惠些吗？

lines.en: OK! If you buy two, I'll give them to you for fifty yuan total.
lines.zh: 好的！如果你买两顶，总共五十元给你。

lines.en: That's a deal! I'll take the blue one and the pink one.
lines.zh: 成交！我要蓝色的和粉色的。

lines.en: Good choice! Here you go. Come back anytime!
lines.zh: 好眼光！给你。随时欢迎再来！
